generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that over 70% of NATO allies still rely on foreign tech for critical infrastructure? Our strategic autonomy isn't just about defense—it's about protecting our digital sovereignty. By investing in domestic tech solutions, we can ensure our national security isn't held hostage by foreign interests. #DigitalSovereignty #NationalSecurity
